# UC-15.4.11 · APC UPS SNMP Battery Replacement Prediction from Age and Impedance

## Description

End-of-life batteries collapse runtime suddenly; SNMP replace indicators and age heuristics schedule swaps before failure.

## Value

Avoids simultaneous multi-string failures after a heat wave.

## Implementation

(1) Validate vendor-specific replace OID mapping. (2) Integrate with procurement SKU.

## SPL

```spl
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups" earliest=-30d
| eval age_months=tonumber(coalesce(battery_age_months, ""))
| eval imp=tonumber(coalesce(upsAdvBatteryReplaceIndicator, upsSmartBatteryReplace, battery_replace_flag, ""))
| eval bad=if(age_months>36 OR imp=2 OR match(lower(_raw), "(?i)replace battery"),1,0)
| where bad=1
| stats latest(age_months) as age_months values(ups_name) as ups by host
```

## Visualization

Table due-for-replacement; timeline.

## References

- [Schneider Electric — APC product support](https://www.se.com/ww/en/product-category/3100-2000-pdu/)
